name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-9
title: spec Surface and contract.md provides drift from build-contract.json + skill source path
description: docs/spec/spec.md lists 8 schemas under schemas/ but contract.md provides lists 7 (omits workspace-structure.json which IS in spec). Spec Surface lists 'declarations/' pointing at .claude/workspace-structure.json (top-level repo) but the file at .claude/features/contract/schemas/workspace-structure.json is the SCHEMA. The 'declarations/' entry crosses scope (writes outside .claude/features/contract/), conflicting with 'Out of Scope: never writes outside .claude/features/contract/'. Either accept the cross-scope ownership of the rabbit workspace declaration explicitly or move it inside the feature.
